title: pelargonium × torrefactum
intro: Pelargonium × torrefactum, also known as Red Bush or Rooibos Tea, is a plant species in the geranium family native to southern Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × torrefactum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, either on its own or blended with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
